title: The Mission Enters Big Mom’s Sea
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the mission enters big mom’s sea within the The WE Times and the Charlotte Family storyline.
scene: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where did he put that "fish Encyclo- Pedia"?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Gosh... Sanji's library sure is full of dirty maga- Zines.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: found it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Do not digest the skin! The skin of this fish is coated in a deadly poison!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Look, Sanji left a note here about it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The skin is deli~ Claus!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For heavens sake Luffy, at least let me grill it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Here, take a bite, carrot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Wow, the skin is so juicy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy ..!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's so good! I'm crying tears of joy, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: I've grilled it following Sanji's recipe to a tee...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Chopper! We need to get some food in that stomach of yours! Eat up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: S... so cold...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Luffy's gonna D-Die..!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: We're Danger- Ously low on medical supplies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Sniff sniff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WA-DIS is adapting (this is amazing)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We HAB to FIDE AN IDEND THOON TAMI DOR- (We HAVE TO FIND AN ISLAND SOON, NAMI OR-)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Good (so good)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know but I can't just find one at the drop of a hat...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This poison supposedly causes "instant death", if I'm not mistaken...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And yet he's alive! That's right... Luffy developed strong immunity to poison, didn't he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Luffy... is he really gonna die?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's alright... the light... it's so beautiful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't worry, he's got some freakish con- situation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't go to the light at the end of the tunnel, Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: A few days have passed, so "black leg" and his captors have in all likelihood arrived at the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: which means we should be in her territory shortly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Her Terri- Tory?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You've got to be... Now it's snow?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cotton Candy?!...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: to be precise...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is "Cotton Candy Snow".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: What? Cotton candy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep beep be

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Territorial Sea Slug

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: RING, RING, RING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh, the Den den mushi is ringing! I wonder who it could be?

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: It is merely catching "Warning waves". It's a sign that we've just crossed into big mama's territory.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It would be wise for your crew to either hide or disguise themselves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Cotton Candy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: YUmmm!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I just spotted some- thing...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Pekoms...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That was fast. They're already here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's our Tartship*, Roar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'll simply follow protocol and procedure... everyone stay quiet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They wouldn't happen to have the antidote, would they?

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: GERMA SPEAKING ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Confirmed sighting of the ship of the straw hat crew!

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: No...!! it's the german AG ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: They're finally. Here! Who and what exactly, is Sanji's family!?

summary: The Mission Enters Big Mom’s Sea: The story widens beyond Zou as the world prepares for the Reverie and the Sanji retrieval team moves toward Big Mom’s territory.
